package.name: exo_msgs
package.description: Custom interface package for the exoskeleton link (M-A, WSL-side first). Lifts seq / monotonic timestamp / application-level CRC from "inferred on the WSL side" to explicit wire fields, and ships the /exo/link_health diagnostic message. Pure interface package (no logic code): ExoHeader, ExoCmd, ExoStatus, LinkHealth. Interface contract: docs/01-ros2-microros-serial/01-接口契约.md (v1.7).
